news.t: Capital Group Unveils Five New Active ETFs, Including Its First Multi-Asset ETF

holdings.infoBox: CGDG is an equity ETF with a total of 107 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 4.44%, Broadcom at 4.04%, Philip Morris International at 3.80%, AstraZeneca at 2.47%, and Welltower at 2.04%.

overview.description: The Capital Group Dividend Growers ETF (CGDG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively selects dividend-paying companies globally that are attractively valued and believed to provide dividend growth. It employs a multi-manager approach to portfolio management. CGDG was launched on Sep 26, 2023 and is issued by Capital Group.

data.title: When the going gets tough, the tough get… "active"?
data.text: When the going gets tough, the tough get… "active"?.

data.title: Capital Group Unveils Five New Active ETFs, Including Its First Multi-Asset ETF
data.text: LOS ANGELES, Sept. 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Capital Group launched five active exchange-traded funds (ETFs) today on the New York Stock Exchange. This compelling lineup includes its first-ever multi-a...
